response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across many languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrated systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or growth/measurement systems — the core focus of this Principal-level role. Title is Staff/Senior rather than Principal, and there's limited evidence of multi-team platform leadership or statistical/experimental analysis depth required for IC6.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background spanning C/C++, Java, TypeScript, Python-adjacent work
High-scale low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s)
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flag platform experience
Lacks evidence of telemetry/metrics platform architecture or statistical analysis depth
Career level (Staff/Senior) and cross-team platform leadership scope below IC6 Principal expectations
